metadata.title: Ronan Ramos Sibunga • Systems-Oriented Software Engineer
metadata.description: Systems-oriented Software Engineer specializing in distributed systems, AI orchestration, infrastructure-aware development, backend architecture, automation workflows, React Native ecosystems, and end-to-end product engineering.
metadata.author: Ronan Ramos Sibunga
metadata.status: Building scalable systems, automation workflows, and AI-powered platforms.

personal.name: Ronan Ramos Sibunga
personal.title: Systems-Oriented Software Engineer
personal.subtitle: Distributed Systems • AI Orchestration • Platform Engineering • Automation
personal.location: San Jose Del Monte, Bulacan, Philippines
personal.summary: Systems-oriented Software Engineer focused on end-to-end product engineering, distributed application systems, AI orchestration workflows, infrastructure-aware development, and scalable backend architectures. Experienced in building production-ready platforms using React Native, Next.js, NestJS, Node.js, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and modern deployment workflows.

contact.address: Ciudad Real Subdivision, City of San Jose Del Monte, Bulacan

competencies.title: End-to-End Product Engineering
competencies.description: Designing and delivering production-grade systems across frontend, backend, infrastructure, deployment workflows, automation services, and operational platforms.

competencies.title: Distributed Systems & Backend Architecture
competencies.description: Building scalable backend services, modular APIs, orchestration workflows, event-driven systems, and resilient application ecosystems using NestJS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker.

competencies.title: AI Orchestration & Intelligent Automation
competencies.description: Developing AI-assisted operational systems, orchestration pipelines, MCP-integrated workflows, local LLM experimentation, and intelligent automation services.

competencies.title: Infrastructure & Platform Engineering
competencies.description: Managing VPS-hosted systems, Dockerized environments, reverse proxies, Cloudflare networking, CI/CD workflows, SSL configuration, and deployment automation.

competencies.title: React Native Application Ecosystems
competencies.description: Engineering scalable cross-platform mobile systems with reusable architecture, performance optimization, and production-ready deployment strategies.

experience.company: Rondev Software Development Services / Lizard Interactive Online
experience.desc: Leading the architecture and development of scalable end-to-end software systems, backend services, AI orchestration workflows, infrastructure automation, and VPS-hosted deployment environments using React Native, Next.js, NestJS, Node.js, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cloudflare, and modern cloud-native engineering practices.

Developed and optimized enterprise-grade React Native systems, performance-critical frontend workflows, scalable application architecture, rendering optimization, and production-level diagnostics for Cebu Pacific Air desktop and mobile platforms.
Built scalable cross-platform mobile systems using React Native, integrated GraphQL APIs, optimized application performance, and improved maintainability across mobile engineering workflows.

Developed scalable eCommerce application systems using ReactJS, Next.js, and React Native while improving SSR performance, React hydration workflows, rendering optimization, and production application responsiveness.
Designed and developed business-oriented web and mobile systems with focus on scalable architecture, responsive application workflows, maintainability, and production-ready frontend engineering.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
